ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., fabric, plastic, metal) */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the material */,
  "material_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_colors" (
  "material_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material color */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the color belongs to */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., MOEGI, TUTUJI) */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex code or color code of the color */,
  "color_type" TEXT /* Type of color (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "material_color_description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  "color_rgb" TEXT /* RGB value of the color */,
  "color_cmyk" TEXT /* CMYK value of the color */,
  "color_lab" TEXT /* LAB value of the color */,
  "color_date_added" TEXT /* Date when the color was added */,
  "color_date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the color was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_colors_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_palettes" (
  "color_palette_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color palette */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the color palette belongs to */,
  "color_palette_name" TEXT /* Name of the color palette */,
  "color_palette_description" TEXT /* Description of the color palette */,
  "palette_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the palette was created */,
  "palette_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the palette was last modified */,
  "palette_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the palette */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palettes_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palettes_palette_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_palette_colors" (
  "color_palette_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color in the color palette */,
  "color_palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color palette the color belongs to */,
  "material_color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material color */,
  "color_position" INTEGER /* Position of the color in the color palette */,
  "color_palette_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the color was added to the palette */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_palette_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palette_colors_material_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_color_id") REFERENCES material_colors ("material_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palette_colors_color_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("color_palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_color_usage" (
  "material_color_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material color usage */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the color belongs to */,
  "material_color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material color */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the color was used */,
  "usage_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the color used */,
  "usage_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the usage */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_color_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_usage_material_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_color_id") REFERENCES material_colors ("material_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_usage_usage_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_usage_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_history" (
  "color_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color change */,
  "material_color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material color */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the color was changed */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the color change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  "change_approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_history_material_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_color_id") REFERENCES material_colors ("material_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_history_change_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production manager) */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the system */,
  "user_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last modified */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "role_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_color_permissions" (
  "material_color_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "material_color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material color */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "permission_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_color_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_permissions_material_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_color_id") REFERENCES material_colors ("material_color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_naming_conventions" (
  "color_naming_convention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each convention */,
  "convention_name" TEXT /* Name of the convention */,
  "convention_description" TEXT /* Description of the convention */,
  "convention_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the naming convention was created */,
  "convention_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the naming convention was last modified */,
  "convention_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the naming convention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_naming_convention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_color_standardization" (
  "material_color_standardization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standardized color */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "color_naming_convention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color naming convention */,
  "standardized_color" TEXT /* Standardized color name */,
  "standardization_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the standardization was created */,
  "standardization_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the standardization was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_color_standardization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_standardization_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_standardization_color_naming_convention_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_naming_convention_id") REFERENCES color_naming_conventions ("color_naming_convention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_color_reports" (
  "material_color_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_color_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_reports_report_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_color_trends" (
  "material_color_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was identified */,
  "trend_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_color_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_trends_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_color_analytics" (
  "material_color_analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was generated */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Analytics data for the material color */,
  "analytics_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the analytics data */,
  "analytics_status" TEXT /* Status of the analytics data (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_color_analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_analytics_analytics_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_color_notifications" (
  "material_color_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_color_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_color_notifications_notification_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
